name: Peppers and Steak (Kxmt69b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving size portions.
2. Place half the steak in the crockpot.
3. Arrange green peppers on top of the steak.
4. Place the remaining steak on top of the peppers.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients and pour over the meat.
6. Cover and cook on Low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or High setting for 4 to 5 hours.
Each serving: 186 calories.
